title: Puff Pastry Veggie Quiche
ingredients: 2 sheets frozen puff pastry (one 17.3-oz package), thawed
2 C. grated Swiss or gruyere cheese

Unroll each sheet of puff pastry on large baking sheet lined with parchment paper.  Saute mushrooms and shallots in 2 tbsp. butter until golden, drain if necessary.  Place cooked mushrooms and shallots and steamed asparagus tips on puff pastry sheets, dividing evenly between sheets. Top with 1 c. grated Swiss cheese.  Blend remaining egg/sour cream ingredients in blender.  Drizzle egg/sour cream mixture evenly on top of puff pastry sheets.  Bake at 400 degrees for 25 minutes or until puffed and golden.
(Optional – add goat cheese dollops before baking. Extra yumminess.)
